case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS IMHOFF,ROBERT VARIOUS APTS C/O LANDMARK REALTY

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-29-1994, DENIED
